examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the single service 'logicmonitor' preselects its only auth method, auth_bearer. Fill in the account name (jsonData.variables.account_name) and API v3 key (secureJsonData "logicmonitor.token", empty here) to get a working datasource.

apiKey.description: Authenticate against https://{account_name}.logicmonitor.com/santaba/rest with a REST API v3 bearer token provided as the write-only secret at secureJsonData "logicmonitor.token".
